entry.title: Re: MD04 Available qty not correct as per scope of check
entry.content:
Hello @MO_Lee 

MD04 doesn't show ATP stock. Available quantity shown in MD04 has nothing to do with ATP stock shown in CO09 and calculated with check scope. 

Don't confuse stock/requirements list / MD04 with ATP stock availability / CO09.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Ability to take picktures of damage upon receipt and...
entry.content:
Hello @MANUEL_ZARATE1958 

That is not part of standard WM RF functionality. I guess you could develop a custom RF transaction to attached pictures.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm
entry.content: Hi Jens, Thanks for your valuable suggestions. Can i know how to reset the implicit personalization from the context menu?...thanks .

entry.title: Supplier Onboarding for SAP Sustainability Data Exchange (SDX)
entry.content:
Whether you're just starting out or looking to scale your carbon footprint data sharing, this step-by-step onboarding guide walks suppliers through everything — from setting up your SAP Universal ID to connecting with customers and sharing PCFs.

  1. Create Your SAP Universal ID: Get started by creating your central login for all SAP services. 
  2. Get SDX Access (free version) via SAP Store. Your Pay-as-you-go BTP account will be set-up automatically
  3. Complete your initial set-up and create users, and assign roles. For more details you find a details 
  4. Set Up Your Company Profile: Enter basic company info to make sure partners can find and connect with you.
  5. Upload Product & Partner Master Data: This step is required to start sending or receiving PCF data.
  6. Assign Product-Partner Relationships: Link products to the customers you supply.
  7. (Optional) Assign Components to Products 
  8. (Optional) Integrate with SAP Sustainability Footprint Management: If you use SFM, connect it with SDX for seamless data sharing.
  9. Optional) Connect with Catena-X: For suppliers in the automotive ecosystem
  10. Set Up Peer Connections: Establish links with your customers to receive PCF requests.
  11.  Exchange PCF Data: Respond to requests, view footprints, and share via the Process Outbounds app. 

If you have any questions, feel free to ask those in the comments below!

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Hana deployment error: Fail to open connection to DB SAP DBTech JDBC
entry.content: Hi, I am using SAP BTP Trail and I am facing the same problem. I am not able to find where I can restart my HANA Cloud manually. Could you please share some screen-shoots about how to do that. Thanks.

entry.title: Configuring SF SSO with IAS is really difficult for internal developer currently.
entry.content:
The manual SSO configuration in provisioning is deprecated. https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/migration-to-sap-cloud-identity-authentication-ias-ips-innovation-alert-amp/ba-p/271407

However, automatic process doesn't work for internal developers. Currently there are 2 options.

1. via the SuccessFactors Upgrade Center.

2. via SPC process.

I tried both of them and an S-User is essential for the job. I'm an internal developer and I don't have the s user surely. It became really difficult for me to configure IAS for our Team's test instances in PROD/PREVIEW

entry.title: Re: Attachment Handling In SAP CPI| Send attachment to XI receiver
entry.content: Hi @SimhaJK2024 the content in this post has been removed for privacy reasons. If you need any help or have any questions, feel free to reach out! 😊

entry.title: Convert LOOP AT with modify to new syntax ABAP 750
entry.content:
Hello Team,

could anybody guide me to convert the below abap code to new syntax as per 750/740

Below the prepopulated (having 2 record line) internal table CT_ITEM has 40+ fields and we wanted to modify 1 field acctasscat. 

LOOP AT ct_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_ctitem>).

      IF line_exists( lt_ctitem-ariba_extension[ field_name = gc_asmtcat_name ] ).


          <ls_ctitem>-acctasscat = lt_ctitem-ariba_extension[ field_name = gc_asmtcat_name ]-field_value.


      ENDIF.


ENDLOOP.

 

I have tried doing it myself but no luck as its creates new record and that new records contain only one column filled. below is tried query

ct_item_tmp = VALUE #( FOR <ls_item_old> IN ct_item
LET lt_item = is_input-purchasing_contract_erpcreate-purchasing_contract-item[ ariba_item_id = <ls_item>-ariba_itemno ]
( acctasscat = COND knttp(
WHEN line_exists( is_input-purchasing_contract_erpcreate-purchasing_contract-item[ ariba_item_id = <ls_item_old>-ariba_itemno ]-ariba_extension[ field_name = gc_asmtcat_name ] )
THEN is_input-purchasing_contract_erpcreate-purchasing_contract-item[ ariba_item_id = <ls_item_old>-ariba_itemno ]-ariba_extension[ field_name = gc_asmtcat_name ]-field_value
ELSE space ) )
( <ls_item_old> ) ).

entry.title: Delivery Note (DN) PGI'ed and need to alter HU info
entry.content: hi, i've PGI a DN however, now i received new info on the HU. will there be any way to redo the HU; i don't have access to VL09.

entry.title: Re: Replicating IT2006
entry.content:
you can follow the steps in help document, 

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central-payroll/implementing-point-to-point-time-data-replication/data-replication-configuration-for-time-accounts-and-related-information-replication

entry.title: Automatic adjustment of the planned delivery date of a component to planed order
entry.content:
How do I automatically adjust the production start date of a planned order to the delivery of a component? Even though the component will be delivered later, e.g. in 10 days, MRP does not take this into account in the planned order for the internal order.

Thank you in advance

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: CAP Fiori Elements Invoking Custom Action (err: Unkno...
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

this is the metadata:

<EntityContainer Name="EntityContainer">
<EntitySet Name="Comp_Type" EntityType="RoyCustDeclMasterDataService.Comp_Type">
<NavigationPropertyBinding Path="SiblingEntity" Target="Comp_Type"/>
</EntitySet>
<EntitySet Name="RoyCustDecl_IMP_DUACUS001" EntityType="RoyCustDeclMasterDataService.RoyCustDecl_IMP_DUACUS001">
<NavigationPropertyBinding Path="SiblingEntity" Target="RoyCustDecl_IMP_DUACUS001"/>
</EntitySet>
<FunctionImport Name="pr_roy_cust_decl_report" Function="RoyCustDeclMasterDataService.pr_roy_cust_decl_report"/>
</EntityContainer>

I changed the CustomActions.js in this way:

sap.ui.define([
	"sap/m/MessageBox",
	"sap/ui/core/library"
], function(MessageBox, coreLibrary) {
    "use strict";
    return {
		message: function(oEvent) {
			let sActionName = "RoyCustDeclMasterDataService.EntityContainer/pr_roy_cust_decl_report";
			let mParameters = {
				model: this.getModel(),
				label: 'Confirm',	
				invocationGrouping: true,
				requiresNavigation: true,
				isNavigable: true,	
			};
			this.editFlow.invokeAction(sActionName, mParameters);
		}
    };
});

but the error is always the same: "Unknown action import"

Any advice?

Thanks

entry.title: Details required on the usage of communication users
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

We are planning to change icf/reject_expired_passwd and rfc/reject_expired_passwd parameters to the value 1 in the systems and before changing the parameter value, we have collected the communication users list for which we need to change the initial user passwords. Before changing the passwords we would like to get the details of RFC's or any other connection name where the users are being used in the interface systems, Can you please share the details like is there any reports or a table on how to fetch the details from the system.

 

 

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EWM Good Receipt Posting - INV20006 Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have integrated SAP DMC to SAP EWM system and when we are trying to post the GR request to EWM system using DMC service - We are getting HTTP400 - INV20006 error. please refer the below screenshot. 

When we try to pack the HU using packing unit plugin - it generate the EWM GR request automatically without any issue. 

@Manoel - Can you please suggest if you have any insights on this? 

#SAP Digital Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: Details required on the usage of communication users
entry.content:
Hello,

 

you can find the connections in table RFCDES. As search word enter the ID of the communication, before and after the ID enter the wildcard '*' .

Example: the ID of the communication user is ABCD. Enter as search expression into the field RFCOPTIONS then ABCD

 

best regards,
Bernhard

entry.title: Re: Convert LOOP AT with modify to new syntax ABAP 750
entry.content: If this field acctasscat is primary key then it will insert new record

entry.title: Re: Exporting Tables from Datasphere to Hana Datalake File System using Replication Flow
entry.content:
Hi Karthik, Nice Blog.

Can you please elaborate on steps to get Keystore file and Keystore password?

 

Regards,

Ravi.

entry.title: SAP Build 新功能：2025年一季度版本亮点
entry.content:
本文本为翻译文，原文档链接What’s New in SAP Build – Q1 2025 Release Highlights，原作者 Jesse Sukhbayar。

SAP Build 不断发展，利用更多人工智能、灵活性和速度，为现代团队的工作方式提供支持。2025 年第 1 季度，我们针对 SAP Build Code、Process Automation、Apps 和 Work Zone 推出了一系列创新成果，帮助开发人员和业务用户比以往更快地将创意转化为企业级解决方案。

无论您是构建自定义应用、创建 SAP S/4HANA 扩展还是简化流程，这些更新都将帮助您更高效地从概念过渡到价值。  我们来回顾一下从上一季度中选择的前 10 项更新。

 

许可和可用性更新

1.SAP Task Center 现在包含在 SAP Build Work Zone 中

SAP Task Center 现在嵌入在所有 SAP Build Work Zone 版本中，为用户提供来自多个 SAP 系统的工作流任务的统一视图 - 位于其 Work Zone 主页中。无需单独集成。此更新还扩展到合作伙伴许可，使自定义 Work Zone 场景中的 Task Center 更容易。这样，业务用户和管理人员就可以在一个工作区中加快审批速度，集中跟踪任务，并提高工作效率。

  1. SAP Build Apps 现在可在更多区域使用

现在，您可以在 EU11 和悉尼数据中心部署 SAP Build Apps，将应用程序提供给更多用户。增加的覆盖范围可提高应用的响应能力，支持区域特定的合规性需求，并为企业用例提供全局可扩展性。

 

Joule for Developers 

3.使用提示生成端到端工作流

在 SAP Build Process Automation 中，开发人员现在可以使用自然语言描述业务场景，并允许生成性 AI 自动创建表单、决策和流程流。此功能由 SAP 专门构建的大型语言模型 (LLM) 提供支持，可提供基于情境的 SAP 感知结果，从而加快工作流创建速度并减少手动工作量。它还使业务用户能够在无需编写代码的情况下对流程设计做出贡献。

4.从 SAP Build Apps 中的数据生成 UI 页面

SAP Build Apps 现在使用生成式 AI 根据您的数据模型建议用户界面页面。例如，如果您的应用包含 Books、Authors 或 Genres 等实体，Joule 会推荐相应的屏幕、布局和控件。这有助于团队快速从数据建模转变为交互式 UI 设计，缩短原型设计周期并提高设计一致性。

5.在 SAP Build Code 中使用 Generative AI 创建 Fiori UI

开发人员现在可以通过输入命令 /add-ui 或在故事板中选择焦耳图标，在 SAP 构建代码中使用 Joule 为现有 CAP 应用生成基于 Fiori 的 UI。焦耳了解您的应用程序结构，并建议相关的布局、控件和导航模式，帮助您快速使用脚手架前端应用，并专注于定制，而不是从头开始。

6.CAP 应用生成的多代理支持

SAP Build Code 现在使用由 Joule 支持的多代理支持来生成完整的 CAP 应用程序。每个代理都专注于特定部分（如数据模型、服务或 UI），因此您可以从单个提示中获取更完整的项目。此增强节省了时间，可帮助您关注业务逻辑，而不是从头开始构建所有内容。

另请阅读 SAP Build Code 中的所有 GenAI 选项概览 ， david_bizer .

 

增强 SAP Business Suite 应用程序

7.使用自定义 UI 扩展 SAP S/4HANA（计划即将发布）

即将在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公共版）中推出，开发人员将能够使用 SAP Build 可扩展性向导创建并排扩展 - 通过定制现有 SAP Fiori 应用或构建全新的 Web 应用程序。这种方法使团队能够满足特定的业务需求，同时保留核心系统，支持精简核心原则和长期灵活性。

  • 请参阅文档：使用可扩展性向导。
  • 在设置中，请阅读博客 @Karthik-Thiru 提供的 SAP Build Extensibility Wizard for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 公共版。 

8.SAP Build 引导式体验的新增强功能

SAP Build 对引导式体验进行了新的增强，有助于简化复杂的流程，如员工入职、育儿假、采购审批和 IT 服务管理，其中涉及多个步骤、系统和利益相关方。 在此版本中，现在可以在 SAP Build Store 中获取 SAP SuccessFactors Employee Onboarding 和转岗的即用型内容包，从而更快地为新员工和内部调动提供一致的逐步指导。

  • 开始： SAP Build 引导式体验 ，florian_buech
  • 观看视频（2 分钟）：借助 SAP Build 引导式体验，规划育儿假。

9.实时工作流的中间消息事件

通过对中间消息事件的新支持，SAP Build Process Automation 允许工作流暂停，直到自动接收并恢复特定 API触发的输入为止。这种强大的功能可减少等待时间和手动监控，帮助团队设计更具适应性和响应能力的流程，同时减少错误和开销。 

 

提高开发人员工作效率

10.SAP Build Code 中改进的项目概览

SAP Build Code 中重新设计的项目概览提供了所有应用组件的基于树的清洁视图，支持 CAP Java 和 CAP 节点。此增强的布局与故事板集成，使开发人员能够更轻松地导航复杂项目、启用新团队成员并在构建时保持专注度。

了解更多

有关新功能的完整列表，请查看以下资源：

  • SAP Build 帮助门户
  • SAP Build Road Map Explorer

entry.title: Re: Data Access Control in Data Builder and Authorization Scenario in Business Builder - SAP Datasph
entry.content:
Hello,

are you able to use Business builder in a proficient manner?

I stop using it because when I try to modify an object I get errors related to versioning.

For example 

if I do:

1) Analytical Dataset (Fact) with associations to dimensions -> Fact Model -> Consumption Model -> Perspective and deploy the perspective.

2) create a new version of the Analytical Dataset.

3) try to substitute the Analytical dataset version inside the Fact Model.

4) get an blocking error: can not replace the version, with this error (if I remember correctly) "only 1 version of the analytical dataset can have activate associations".

=> this error lead me systematically to create again from zero all the objects from Analytical dataset to the perspective. for this problem I stop using business builder in every customer tenant.

entry.title: SEN Migration KYMA_role author after migration to production instance
entry.content:
Hello,

Once the migration of the productive instance is complete, the customer will receive a confirmation. SAP Enable Now authors must:

  • Download their workareas from the new server.
    • Will the author get a message on the screen when opening Producer? Or do they need to do someting manually? Or should the uninstall Producer and re-install again?
  • Reconfigure CALM integration by re-adding the secret in Workspace Administration for the CALM workspace.
    • I suppose this is only applicable when using SAP Cloud ALM?

Thx for your support in above questions?

KR, Maggy

entry.title: Re: Custom UIBB Not Visible in sap mdg fpm

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: cannot access Feed.Color for lin...
entry.content:
Hi,

getmembers returns the structure of the measures and not dimensions. When we are using getmembers for line chart with Feed.Color it will not result anything as Feed.Color has a dimension selected.

Thanks,

Jain

But the switch on my custom Horizon dark mode is not working, while if i choose the standard morning horizon the switch to the standard Horizon evening is ok. What am i missing?  How could i link a custom theme with his dark version?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP PS Public Cloud Project Budget
entry.content: Hello Gizem Kaya, For the project budget upload to the system, whether you are using a new created G/L account(cost element)? If yes, you need to maintain the new created G/L to FSV-YPS2, and after which you can get the data in Project Budget Report. Please kindly check the note for your reference: https://me.sap.com/notes/2799100/E

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - What You Need to Know About the Kafka Adapter
entry.content: @jens_kordowskiis there an update for the the Schema Registry in Kafka?

entry.title: Re: How to transfer the material EWM storage bin to Kitti...
entry.content: Hi, If Production location is IM managed (Non-EWM) and raw material is at EWM managed location. You may consider with scope item 3DV. If both production location and raw material location are EWM managed, you may consider scope item 5HO. Both are delivery relevant, you can use delivery to do the staging and move the raw material stock to production location first then do consumption. There are other two scenarios for staging: Scope item 6NI - With PMR document. Scope item 3VT - Kanban replenishment Best Regards, Lillian SAP Support

entry.title: On Premise / Private Cloud Fiori Launchpad - News in New My Home
entry.content:

we are on S4 2023 FPS3 on Premise. And have activated the New My Home. 

Has someone more information how to configure the News Tile? 

I did only find information for the public cloud.

Maybe @ThomasReiss ?

Best Regards Richard

Is it possible to add timestamp in target filename in outbound Replication Flow? If yes, how to do this?

We must send several outbound files per day and would like to use time stamp in the target file names.

Br, Matti

entry.title: Re: Empty profit center from billing documents gets overw...
entry.content:
Hello,

I understand that indeed it is the best practice to have always a profit center but as per our customers input there are cases that they have no profit center being filled in and are not really willing to. 

br, Ilse

entry.title: Re: U: Error or Bug in Analytics Cloud Live Model Paramet...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

SAC usually sends a search filter ( DIM.DISPLAY_KEY CP '*5510*' OR DIM.TEXT CP '*5510*') in a pseudo ABAP notation (CP means contains pattern, DIM is the dimension name and DISPLAY_KEY, TEXT an 'attribute'). In BW it depends on the dimension (characteristic) type whether this type of search filter is supported. If not, BW will send the message you observed.

Please check note https://me.sap.com/notes/3196008 , this contains more information, maybe it was not yet implemented in the BW back end system.

Regards,

Gregor

entry.title: Where used details required for communication users in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are planning to change icf/reject_expired_passwd and rfc/reject_expired_passwd parameters to the value 1 in the ABAP system and before changing the parameter value, we have collected the communication users list for which we need to change the initial user passwords. Before changing the passwords we would like to get the details of RFC's or any other connection name where the communication users are being used in the interface systems, Can you please share the details like is there any reports or a table on how to fetch the details from the system.

Regards

Tulasi

entry.title: Comparing Guided Implementation with Task Management Application in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
In SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation, while both Guided Implementation and Task Management Application serve important roles in managing projects, each has its specific strengths and is designed for different use cases. Below, we compare both tools to help users understand when to use each application and the benefits they provide.

You can find more information about the Guided Implementation here. 

Guided Implementation 

  • Purpose: A structured approach for managing and executing implementation tasks with clear task phases, dependencies, and roles.
  • Key Benefits:
    • Focused Execution: Ensures users see only tasks relevant to their role and project phase, improving task prioritization and reducing clutter.
    • Role-Specific Filters: Tasks are filtered based on the user’s role, ensuring they only see tasks assigned to them or their role.
    • Streamlined Workflow: Provides direct access to related tasks and checklist items, with a clear, visual progress tracker.
    • Integrated Navigation: Users can easily navigate between tasks, quality gate checklist items, and project progress reporting.

When to Use: Use Guided Implementation when you need a streamlined, phase-based approach for task execution and project monitoring, especially during the initial stages of an implementation project where following a set order of tasks and completing checklists is critical.

 

 

Task Management Application

  • Purpose: A comprehensive tool for managing detailed tasks, tracking their completion, and handling task dependencies across various project types.
  • Key Benefits:
    • Detailed Task Management: Suitable for detailed task tracking, including assignments, deadlines, dependencies, and task progress.
    • Customizable Views: Provides flexibility in creating custom views and task reports tailored to the needs of the project.
    • Advanced Task Editing: Ideal for complex tasks that require detailed editing or handling of multiple dependencies and relationships.

When to Use: Use the Task Management Application when you need deep task tracking with flexibility and advanced configurations, such as handling non-linear dependencies or when tasks do not follow a strict phase-based approach.

 

Summary: When to Use What

  • Use Guided Implementation for a structured, easy-to-follow approach when managing SAP project implementation tasks, particularly when handling project phases, task dependencies, and quality gates. It's perfect for teams focused on following a well-defined, linear path to success.
  • Use Task Management Application when the project requires more granular, flexible task tracking, especially when tasks are non-sequential, complex, or need custom configurations that go beyond the scope of Guided Implementation.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Upgrade from 1809 to 2023
entry.content: Hi, could you share us any information that you get. We need to upgrade our systems exactly as you do. BR.

entry.title: Not able to update the values in S4Hana public with PUT method
entry.content:
Dear community,

 

I tried to update the value in a purchase order with the PUT method using Postman. The response was 200 OK, but the value was not updated.

I also tried the same thing using the Try Out feature on Business Accelerator Hub, and I successfully updated the value.

Here is the setting that I used on Postman:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

・Method：PUT

・URL：https://my4*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_purchaseorder_2/srvd_a2x/sap/purchaseorder/0001/PurchaseOrder/0 

・Authentication：Basic Authentication

・Header：

　・x-csrf-token＆cookie：the value that I fetched by executing GET method with the header "x-csrf-token：Fetch"

・Body（Raw, Json）：

　

{"YY1_processedFlg_PDH":false}

* "YY1_processedFlg_PDH"：Custom field

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

I would really appreciate any advice on this issue!

Please give me a comment if there is anything unclear for you to figure the problem out.

 

Thank you.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Activate standard ODATA V2 API on S/4HANA - Consume & Test using Gateway Client
entry.content:
Hi  VishalKumar,

This blog is very helpful for customers who don't want to do futher development.

With the API document we can use get method to query specific data such as product master data, by extending cds views we can also add custom fields to responding structure.

After that, we try to add custom fields and logic when using post method to create or change product master data, I check the document it says we have to use a fiori APP called ‘’Custom fields and logic", I want to know do you have any other way to do that? As a ABAP developer side I think we have the Odata project and BADI in SAP system, it should not be that complex to do so.

Thanks for your help and such a clearly blog.

entry.title: Re: Missing Profit Center (VBRP-PRCTR) in Billing Document
entry.content:
Hello,

If you have cross-company sales, it is possible that the profit center is missing, this is a standard system behavior. Please check OSS note 1532865. If this is the reason why you are seeing blank profit center values in VBRP-PRCTR, then you can check this note for a possible solution on the SD side.

If this is not the reason for the missing profit center and you are determined to fix the missing profit center at time of settlement, you can check transfer manager event 65, target structure KOMLFP-WERKS or KOMFLP-PRCTR and you can use sample class CL_WLF_TR_SV_6F_COMP_CODE as an example to write logic to populate the missing plant or profit center in the settlement document line item.

Hope this helps.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud: cannot access Feed.Color for lin...
entry.content: Hi Jain, thank you for your answer. Do you by any chance know how one could then add additional versions to the color feed of a line graph via scripts?

entry.title: Re: Unable to see the Joule entitlement in BTP
entry.content:
Hello @felixbartler,

Who is  SAP Account Executive? How can I confirm who my SAP Account Executive is?
Regards,
Reiko

entry.title: Re: On Premise / Private Cloud Fiori Launchpad - News in New My Home
entry.content: Ok I found out that via UI Adaption Mode we can set an URL. But at the moment I don´t know the correct format for this feed.

entry.title: How to explode BOM using CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2 with only approved ECNs (AENR-RLKEY = '1')?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m using the function module CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2 to explode BOMs based on effective dates. However, I’ve encountered a business requirement where only BOMs with approved ECNs (i.e. AENR-RLKEY = '1') should be considered during the explosion.

I’ve reviewed the parameters of CS_BOM_EXPL_MAT_V2 and couldn’t find any direct option that filters based on the ECN release key.

❓Is there a standard way to ensure that only BOM changes from approved ECNs are included in the explosion?

Or do I need to implement custom logic to determine the DATUV based on AENR and manually ensure the RLKEY = '1' before calling the function?

Any insights or experience on this would be greatly appreciated. Thanks in advance!

This is especially important in our case because BOM versions might exist in the system but are not yet approved for production.

Any help or hint would be greatly appreciated. Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Button and Event Handling in SALV (SAP List Viewer)
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content:
@sambtr Ok, in this case (without any repair object), In-House Repair can't be set to Completed.
You would have to address this need as an improvement request on our customer influence portal: Homepage - Customer Influence

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow from S/4HANA to Azure Data Lake
entry.content:
Hey community,

I'd read several times this great blog and do not understand the following outcome.

1) Just following this case trying to replicate one single cds view (in fact a CDS view on table QMEL)

2) After few minutes, I got the following error message: 

Transferring initial data failed due to the following error:
data could not be converted (keys: values for key fields, columns: names of failing columns):
keys=[000090001141]
columns=[/sapsmoss/erdat /sapsmoss/erzeit /isdfps/mhioAddate /isdfps/mhioAdtime]
reason=[/sapsmoss/erdat:unexpected value: string(8) has invalid length: 10]
[/sapsmoss/erzeit:unexpected value: string(6) has invalid length: 12]
[/isdfps/mhioAddate:unexpected value: string(8) has invalid length: 10]
[/isdfps/mhioAdtime:unexpected value: string(6) has invalid length: 12].

3) I'd explicitly also ask to copy columns from source object. And I played with different settings, also creating a projection and forcing the fields length at the mentioned target, No chances 😞 always the same errors appears. 

Now, I'd tried to first copy the cds view to a local table into the DSP. Then replicate thise local table to Azure and it works perfectly !? 

What could be the reason of the initial error?
How can I fix it?

Thank you folks for any advice !

entry.title: I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.
entry.content:
I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.

 
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" >
                <Collection>                    
                    <Record Type="UI.DataField">                                      
                        <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>category}"/>                    
                        <Annotation Term="HTML5.RowSpanForDuplicateValues" Bool="true"/>
 .............................................
 
I configured it as above, but there is no change on the screen.

 

===============================

HTML5 Vocabulary

Namespace: com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1

Terms for HTML5

The HTML5 vocabulary provides rendering hints for HTML5 clients

Terms

Term Type Description

CssDefaultsCssDefaultsTypeCSS definitions that may be used as defaults
This term can applied to e.g. UI.DataFieldAbstract records
LinkTargetLinkTargetTypeWhere to open a link for the annotated URL
When the UI contains a link to the URL, it shall open as specified by this annotation. This can be achieved, for example, by giving the UI5 sap.m.Link element a corresponding target property. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
RowSpanForDuplicateValues (Experimental)TagThe annotated data field might use a rowSpan for adjacent duplicate values if used in a table.
In order to achieve a good user experience the respective columns should be sorted. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.

entry.title: Measure Input Control Error
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have been using the measure/dimension input controls for a while now without any problems, but suddenly it shows this error when expanding the input control

Is this an update in the tool or am I missing something?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Hey, I'm new here ^^
entry.content: Welcome @fatemehzarei_001 - it's great to have you in SAP Community! Feel free to join some of our groups and connect to other community members. Perhaps there is a location group near you that you would like to join.

entry.title: Re: Empty profit center from billing documents gets overw...
entry.content:
Hello,

unfortunately the solution via the transfer events did not work. Apparently an empty value is not passed. Also the empty profit center is being filled by standard in the program LWRGMF0M already before the tranfer event 65. So a check on an empty profit center is not possible in transfer event 65.

We are looking now into the option of filling the profit center in the business volume table and the related CCM tables. 

Having a profit center on all billing documents is not feasible according the clients input. 

Br, Ilse

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content: Great to have you here @KellyO - you can learn a lot here in SAP Community, as well as ask questions, share information, take part in events and connect with others locally in location groups.

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: @Paul: Putting AND T12."LocCode" = T11."WhsCode" back in doesn't make a difference unfortunately, I still get duplicate lines. I may be able to work with this for what I need but would like it to work properly.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Calendar integration into Microsoft Office 365 (incl. Microsoft Teams)
entry.content:
Hi Louisa,

client secrets are currently not an option for authentication.
The only way the SAP SAC Calendar gains the privilege to use the Graph API is via delegated access.

You can find more information about this here:
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/auth/auth-concepts#delegated-access-access-on-behalf-of-a-user
https://me.sap.com/notes/3544663
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/graph/auth-v2-user

Kind regards,
Matthias

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: @William: I used the joins you mentioned above for the OILM which stops the duplication but the bin location is then blank

entry.title: Re: Introduction
entry.content: Dear Katherine, thank you so much for the warm welcome and info! I will check it out!

entry.title: Re: SAP AI Core Generative AI Hubのプロンプトレジストリ機能を解き明かす
entry.content:
こちらのブログ記事、大変参考になりました。

Generative AI Hubに関連して質問させてください。（まだ実機で確認できていない段階での質問となり恐縮ですが、）

SAP AI Launchpadで提供されている「Prompt Management」と、今回ご紹介いただいたGenerative AI Hub内の「Prompt Registry」について、その違いや関係性はどのようになるのでしょうか？

私の理解では、「Prompt Registry」はAPIを介してプログラム的にプロンプトを管理・利用でき、Orchestration workflowからも呼び出せる機能である、と認識しています。

一方で、「Prompt Management」は、主にAI LaunchpadのPrompt Editorで作成・編集したプロンプトを保存しておく場所であり、LLMアプリケーションを開発する際の参考プロンプトのリポジトリ、といった位置づけになるのでしょうか？

この理解が正しいか、また、これら二つの機能がどのように使い分けられ、あるいは連携するのかについて、ご教示いただけますでしょうか。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Problems with the transfer of deleted processes from the staging table ‘/IBP/SOSRES_EXT’ to IBP
entry.content:
Hello together, 

I use the extractor “/IBP/PRODUCTIONRESOURCE_ATTR” to transfer operations from the production versions to the IBP. I delete an operation in the routing. This also disappears from the staging table “/IBP/SOSRES_EXT”. Because of update mode "InsertUpdate" the entry is not deleted in IBP Master Data Type "Production Source Resource". How can the deletion be transferred to the IBP?

Kind regards, 

H. Aydin

entry.title: Re: Exporting list from "Test Your Processes"
entry.content: Thanks for your feedback. Can you please also let me know when this functionality will be available, is it planned?

entry.title: Re: Welcome everyone
entry.content: Welcome @Nat_M - you can learn a lot here, as well as ask questions, share information, take part in events and connect with others locally in location groups. There are some SAP SuccessFactors groups, and perhaps you can follow the SAP SuccessFactors managed tags that you are interested in.

entry.title: Re: Hi Everyone
entry.content: Welcome to SAP Community @sunghun_lee2 - let us know when you have questions - and happy exploring!

entry.title: Re: How to attach the uploaded files of sap BPA to email
entry.content:
Hi @rohit_singhal;,

Thanks for the explanation.

And do you have any practice blog for the two ways you mentioned?

entry.title: Re: NWDS idle session timeout
entry.content: You can set it in the Preferences of NWDS -> Konfiguration of PI Tools -> Session Time Out (in Minutes)

entry.title: Cancel goods issue as material has not reached the customer
entry.content:
Hi All,

How can we cancel the goods issue, if we do a goods issue and find out that there is something wrong with the package, but material is still in out truck and has not reached the customer.

Do we still need to create a return PO or there is any process to cancel the goods issue and invoices in standard SAP?

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
@AndreaDri ,

No, it makes more sense to keep them separate. Although on a technology stack level S4HANA and ECP share a lot of simularities, ECP has services focussed on payroll which are missing on H4S4. Also ECP is being actively developed (e.g., the additions to PCC and the 'Explain my Pay Statement" functionality coming in the 1H 2025 release), H4S4 is stagnant and will not get these enhancements (or only on a limited level)

entry.title: Re: Now Available: Manage Your SAP Business AI Features Flexibly from a Single Place
entry.content:
Hi @JAEUK,

thanks a lot for your feedback. It took us a bit longer than expected to release the tab for all customers. Sorry for the inconvenience. Can you please revisit SAP for Me again? If the tab is still not visible, please reach out to our team: srinivas.muppalla@sap.com, we're happy to support.

Please note that the number of AI features that can be activated from the dashboard is still limited. We're working with high priority on extended this. Stay tuned.

Best, Lena

entry.title: How to get the commitment, Actual cost & Revenue of project using CDS view in public cloud
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am using the CDS view I_ActualPlanJournalEntryItem to fetch the Commitment and Actual Cost & Revenue Values for custom report development in SAP Public cloud.

However, despite applying all possible filters, we are unable to obtain the correct Commitment and Actual Cost & Revenue Values for the project.

Could you please suggest the exact filters required to extract the correct Commitment and Actual Values? This is a high-priority request, as the delivery of the object depends on the accurate output. Or let me know the any alternate way to get these values.

Your prompt assistance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Return case for material without master data
entry.content:
Hi,

I received a question from customer where they would like to create a return for a material without a material number and material master data. The original PO was created with an account assignment to cost center. The advanced return PO option is not an alternative as I've understood it. What are the remaining options for customer? They work with Public Cloud. They have received a credit memo invoice but have nothing to match it with.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: F2582 Team Utilization and Workers Management Hierarchy
entry.content:
We are able to execute the App [F2582 -  Team Utilization] based on the workers work agreement in the app [F6097 – Manage Workforce] where the manager is directly assigned to the individual workers, we are not able to execute the app for subordinate workers.

example

David Jones (P000057) is the manager of the following

  • P000045 Arthur Baily
  • P000049 Janice Short
  • P000111 Philip Johnson
  • 54321       Kiran Gardner
  • P000127 Jane Ford

And  Janice Short (P000049) is the manager

  • P000044 Carlos Sainz .

When David Jones (P000057) executes the App F2582 -  Team Utilization they do see the following

  • P000045 Arthur Baily
  • P000049 Janice Short
  • P000111 Philip Johnson
  • 54321       Kiran Gardner
  • P000127 Jane Ford

However David Jones (P000057)  does not see P000044 Carlos Sainz who David Jones (P000057) is ultimately the manager of as he is the manager of Janice Short (P000049).

Has anyone else encountered this issue and found a way to be able to manage this ? Thanks in Advance.

Hi Alex,
thanks a lot for sharing this. I do have several customers waiting for a good Gantt chart which this seems to be.
I'll start testing it.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report: Object Reference not set to an Instan...
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I tried this note https://me.sap.com/notes/3378681 to solve my problem.
But it didn't work.
Please i still need your help.

entry.title: Re: Setting up Realignment in IBP
entry.content:
Very good material Kunal Roy. 

Thanks for posting

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP Table Related to Transport Management with Freight Amount Field
entry.content:
Hello @RB_kumar 

TM is built with BOBF / Business Object Processing Framework. Therefore TM data should be read with BOBF functions, not directly from DB tables. See SAP TM Enhancement Guide for details how to develop in TM with BOBF.

Transportation charges are implemented with the /SCMTMS/TCC_TRNSP_CHRG business object:

They are available in the TRANSPORTCHARGES and TRANSPORTCHARGES_INTERNAL nodes of the /SCMTMS/TOR object that implements freight orders:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SapUniversalID is Case-Sensitive on the User-Name?!
entry.content:
well: this seems fixed: 
today joachim[....] was fine again

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content: You mean adding additional occurences inside the target structure? Since it is possible that I receive between 0 and six costCenter data sets I would appreciate to do thie dynamically using the UDF and at least in my understanding it should work or is this not possible at all?

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Application Extension Methodology version 2.3
entry.content: Interesting ! Thanks for sharing !

entry.title: Re: Reference Design for SAP S4/HANA Side-by-Side Extension with SAP CAP deployed on SAP BTP CF
entry.content:
Security issue : you do not transmit the user data via urls.

I think you should use the same Identity provider instead with SSO and everything will be smooth and the user principal will be forwarded via the session token seamless by the workzone router

entry.title: How to blog in SAP Community
entry.content:
Sooo, apparently I still feel/hope SapCommunity is relevent;
And apparently, today is the first time since(...?) that I want to create a blog post here (I did quite a few in the past, though).

I learned:
1. I have to "join group" first (The group for ABAP beeing "Application Development and Automation Blog Posts ")
2. I don't get a "publish" button, but a ""submit for review"-one?!

well, ok.
Hope this works! *fingerscrossed* 🙂

entry.title: How to use bseg and for all entries in
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Since BSEG is a cluster table, it does not support JOIN, ORDER BY, or GROUP BY operations.

How should the code be written in this case?

 

I used a query as below,

   SELECT
B~BUKRS  C~SAKNR B~AUGDT B~AUGBL B~ZUONR B~GJAHR B~BELNR
B~BUZEI  B~BUDAT B~BLDAT A~CPUDT B~WAERS B~XBLNR B~BLART
B~BSCHL  "ZUMSK
 B~SHKZG  B~GSBER B~MWSKZ B~DMBTR B~WRBTR
B~SGTXT  B~HKONT
C~REBZG  C~REBZJ C~REBZZ B~XRAGL B~XREF1 B~XREF2
B~XNEGP  B~XREF3 B~BUPLA B~BUZID B~AUGGJ
APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE GT_BSIS
FROM bkpf as A JOIN BSIS AS B ON
    A~BUKRS = B~BUKRS
    AND A~GJAHR = B~GJAHR
    AND A~BELNR = B~BELNR JOIN BSEG AS C ON
    B~GJAHR = C~GJAHR
    AND B~BELNR = C~BELNR
    AND B~BUZEI = C~BUZEI
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN GT_BSISD2_E
WHERE A~BUKRS = P_BUKRS
      AND C~REBZJ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZJ
      AND C~REBZG EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZG
      AND C~REBZZ EQ GT_BSISD2_E-REBZZ
      AND B~GSBER EQ GT_BSISD2_E-GSBER
AND ( C~REBZG NE SPACE
            AND C~REBZG NE 'V' ).

entry.title: Project system in Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have requirements for a customer to configure capital and logistics project for a Client who has selected RISE with SAP. However, there are no scope items for projects within Private Edition. How should we proceed if we want enable managing of enterprise projects for customer within SAP which would include Procurement and Production processes and also resource and time management? Can we do it by ourself by following the script from Public Cloud or do we need to request SAP as addional service under EML to help us in setting up the system?

Regards,
Arnab

entry.title: SAP B1: Can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style
entry.content:
I can't perform Add/Update action to User-defined object Matrix Style form.

I've tried done it with DIAPI GeneralService & GeneralData and it works but can't add or update the data from the Matrix Style form. Also tried with Header Line Style and it works as well.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Company Code without Controlling Area Assignment
entry.content:
Hello!

I know that there is only one controlling area (A000) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Is there a way to create a company code that is not assigned to any controlling area?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

entry.title: SAP ASE HADR - database replication limit
entry.content:
Hello all,

for my client I am planning a migration of his stand-alone ASE 16.0 SP02 PL07 instances from AIX to RHEL. Our current HADR solution is actually a DR-only on OS-level by means of IBM PowerHA System Mirror.

We want to propose the client a HADR solution on database-level by means of SAP ASE HADR (Always-On) as he already pays for its components in ASE licences.

The highest ASE version that is compatible with client's application is 16.0 SP04 PL02 and this is our target. However, the client is aware that before 12.2027 he will need to upgrade to 16.1.

On HADR User Guide overview webpage for both SP04 PL02 and 16.1 versions - HADR Users Guide | SAP Help Portal  - we can read the following:


  • The HADR feature included with SAP ASE supports only a single-companion server. Versions SP03 PL03 and later support a three node architecture, with a companion SAP ASE server and a disaster recovery node.
  • You can manage multiple databases (certified with 20) at the same time in an HADR environment for custom applications using SAP Replication Server version 16.0 SP03 PL04 and later.

 

I asked SAP Support about this limit of 20 databases set for replication and they only confirmed, but also redirected by to Communities for guidance from professionals who have experience with this product.

My target instance has 24 databases in total. I assume that we don't set system databases (master, model, sybsystemprocs, sybsecurity, tempdb.) for replication as they need to remain instance-specific. If this is true, then I fall within this limitation as there are 15 user databases on my instance.

Still, I would like to confirm if it's technically possible to have more than 20 databases set for replication. I was told by a fellow ASE dba that because version SP03 PL03 and higher support a three-node architecture, you could have more than 20 databases replicated by means of spreading them across nodes 2 and 3. Is this true ? If not, are there other means to bypass this limitation ?

Thank you in advance !

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Button and Event Handling in SALV (SAP List Viewer)
entry.content:
what is 

zif_na_salv_constants

entry.title: Quantities sold per warehouse
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to know the total quantities sold per warehouse of all items that were entered a year or more ago.

I have the start of query:

SELECT
T0.[CreateDate],
T0.[ItemCode],
T0.[ItemName]

FROM 
OITM T0 

WHERE 
T0.[CreateDate] <=[%0]

ORDER BY
1 DESC

The result must be someting like this:

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATION DATE   ITEM CODE   ITEM NAME     WAREHOUSE1   WAREHOUSE2  WAREHOUSE 3
08-09-2022      APP         APPLE         1             82         0
14-12-2019      PEE         PEER          84           160         0
25-07-2018      ORA         ORANGES       120          180         14

Can someone help me with that?

entry.title: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
We want to reverse the posted depreciation for a specific period and we want to stop posting depreciation against that asset in the forthcoming periods. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
Please remember there is no standard tool to reverse depreciation postings. Please check KBA 2450680 - Reversal of depreciation posting (AFAB) is not possible .

As for stopping depreciation for an asset, please check KBA 2444093 - How to "shutdown" an asset?

Alternatively, you could set depreciation key 0000 or MANU from a certain date in the time-dependent depreciation terms in AS02.

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud: What’s New as of 2023-03-13?
entry.content:
Dear Leonora,

I am encountering an issue with report visualization in SAP PaPM Cloud (standard model). After having istantiated a process simulation, I created a report by dragging a query into the white workspace. This generated a default bar/column chart.

I wish to modify the chart type and colors used, but I am facing the following difficulties:

  1. When I access "Full Screen Mode" to customize the chart, the save button (floppy disk icon) is disabled. How can I save the changes and view the customized chart on the report's initial page (story page)?
  2. How can I change the colors used in the legend and data of the chart (e.g., the bar/columns)?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

Daniela C.

entry.title: Re: Service Order with External Service Procurement
entry.content:
Hi Gert,

I can't find the account assignment category R in my system and the mys system versoion is 2023 FPS01 how can configre it as the standard settings to be to generate the PO automatic.

What is the partner function is used to preferd the vendor in the line item to pickied in the PO.

entry.title: Re: gCTS - Error WRITE_MANIFEST_FILE File handler cannot write file during CLONE of Github repositor
entry.content: @sunil_sap18 Hi , Was the issue resolved ? We also getting the same issue
